zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Elisabeth Douglas於1415年3月7日出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾莫頓時，她的父親James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith20歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Gifford23歲。她於1430年與Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年2月22日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年74歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Elisabeth Douglas于1415年3月7日出生在苏格兰度福利爾莫頓时，她的父亲James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith20岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Gifford23岁。她于1430年与Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年2月22日在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年74岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Elisabeth Douglas was born on 7 March 1415, in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, was 20 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, was 23. She married Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine in 1430, in Selkirkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. She died on 22 February 1490, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 74, and was buried in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Elisabeth Douglas est née le 7 mars 1415, à Morton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine en 1430, à Selkirkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 février 1490, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Elisabeth Douglas am 7. März 1415 in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith 20 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Gifford 23. Sie hat 1430 in Selkirkshire, Scotland Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Februar 1490 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Elisabeth Douglas è nata il il 7 marzo 1415 nel Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine nel 1430, nel Selkirkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì il 22 febbraio 1490, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Elisabeth Douglasが1415年3月7日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアモートンで生まれた時，父James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeithは20歳，母Lady Elizabeth Giffordは23歳であった。1430年にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアでThomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年2月22日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで74歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Elisabeth Douglas(이)가 1415년 3월 7일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Gifford(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1430년 스컷랜드 셀커크실르에서 Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 2월 22일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에 묻혔다.

pt.7 March 1415–22 February 1490: 7 de março de 1415–22 de fevereiro de 1490
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Elisabeth Douglas nasceu em 7 de março de 1415, em Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine em 1430, em Selkirkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1490, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Elisabeth Douglas родилась 7 марта 1415 г. в местности мортон, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Gifford, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine в 1430 г. в местности селкиркшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 22 февраля 1490 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.7 March 1415–22 February 1490: 7 de marzo de 1415–22 de febrero de 1490
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Elisabeth Douglas nació el 7 de marzo de 1415, en Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine en 1430, en Selkirkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1490, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
